title: What is the Adam Project
wikitext:
[]: What is the Adam Project             Quote Post by fearlubu » Sat May 15, 2010 3:06 pm Ive only noticed it mentioned a few times in the series....i was always curious in what that project was about.....

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat May 15, 2010 5:37 pm It's the Evangelion Project, also known as "Project E", where they clone Adam and make and maintain Evangelions. Episode 21 wrote: AKAGI: Yes, it is an Eva, made from Adam by man. FUYUTSUKI: An Eva?! IKARI: This is the Adam Revival Project, generally known as Project E, and this is our mockup, Eva Unit 00. FUYUTSUKI (OFF): A prototype for a god?!

[]:             Quote Post by fearlubu » Sat May 15, 2010 7:15 pm ahhh alright alright, i just got confused and didnt know that it was just project-E thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Jul 11, 2010 8:28 am The Adam Project and Project E are not the same thing. Project E is also known as the Adam Revival Project. It's a similar name, so confusion is understandable, but according to the Classified Information, it's a different project: Details of the Human Instrumentality Project, Generally Recognized Information wrote: Nerv's three big projects are Project E, the Adam Project, and the Human Instrumentality Project.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Sun Jul 11, 2010 8:35 am At a guess I'd say it was harnessing Adam's power for human use, the first attempt at which caused 2I.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Jul 11, 2010 9:00 am That's doubtful. I really do think the retcon screwed it up, considering it's brought up right before Unit 00 takes the Lance of Longinus down to Terminal Dogma: Episode 14 wrote: Fuyutsuki: What is the status of the Adam Project? Gendo: Proceeding smoothly. It's not even two percent behind schedule. Fuyutsuki: Then, the Lance of Longinus is... Gendo: It's going as planned. Rei is carrying out the operation.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Sun Jul 11, 2010 1:40 pm Now that you bring it up, I'm confused about that bit. Am I to believe that previously to Rei carrying the Lance down, Lilith was nailed to the cross in Terminal Dogma by her arms but otherwise unrestrained? ...or was she supposedly really meant to be entirely up until the end (ep24), when she was retconned into Lilith? No wonder even Kaworu got outsmarted. What are we mere mortals to do against the directors of our lives that switch Angels when we're not looking?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Jul 11, 2010 1:54 pm There was no need to restrain Lilith, as her soul was elsewhere. The Lance was stuck into her for the purpose of stopping her growth. Classified Information wrote: For the purpose of opening the Path to God, Gendo and Seele brought Lilith's growth to a point just before the final stage, and to temporarily delay this they are having Nerv transport the Spear of Longinus that was paired with Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Sun Jul 11, 2010 2:01 pm In which case...the Adam project is about keeping embryonic Adam safe with the intent of a union with Lilith, as opposed to the HIP which is bringing about 3I... as a result of the Adam/Lilith union. Thin distinction is thin.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Jul 11, 2010 2:04 pm Gendo's scenario for Third Impact was always different from Seele's. Gendo intended to use Adam, whereas Seele intended to use... well, apparently not Kaworu, judging from their dialogue once Kaworu took control of Unit 02...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 11, 2010 2:05 pm Adam Project= Keeping Adam safe and or eventual grafting her into Gendo's hand. Project E= Stuff involving the Eva units. Human Instrumentality Project= Duh. >_> NaveryW: Seele intended to use Eva-01 as a surrogate for Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Sun Jul 11, 2010 2:12 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Adam Project= Keeping Adam safe and or eventual grafting her into Gendo's hand.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 11, 2010 3:29 pm Take the following as you will: Translation wrote: (Theorizing by that Japanese Eva-wikipedia fansite, nothing necessarily taken as canon.) Regarding the release of the modifications/changes to Episode 24: 1) "Adam's revival." The sample was revealed to have been illegally diverted, Gendo's lines in Episode 15 are irrelevant. 2) What's called "The Adam Project" became a project that was discarded/destroyed (literally in Japanese: "a dead letter"). The Committee knows very well about the existence of "Adam's revival". 3) There were actually multiple Adam samples that were revived in the story. 4) The Adam Project was changed into the "Lilith Project".

[]:             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Wed Jul 14, 2010 10:41 pm NAveryW wrote: There was no need to restrain Lilith, as her soul was elsewhere. The Lance was stuck into her for the purpose of stopping her growth.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Jul 14, 2010 11:59 pm Lilith can't generate an Anti-AT Field if her soul isn't in her body.

[]:             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Thu Jul 15, 2010 12:06 am AuraTwilight wrote: Lilith can't generate an Anti-AT Field if her soul isn't in her body.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jul 15, 2010 6:32 am The CI outright says why Lilith was impaled. Speculation is unnecessary.

[]:             Quote Post by Falcon_of_the_Sun » Sun Nov 10, 2013 7:55 am Sorry to bump this up... The Adam Project (i.e. NOT the Adam Revival project) is mentioned only once in the series if my anal Ctrl+F of the Platinum trascripts doesn't fail me. It's in Ep 14. FUYUTSUKI: What is the status of the Adam Project? IKARI: Proceeding smoothly. It's not even two percent behind schedule. FUYUTSUKI: Then, the Lance of Longinus is... IKARI: It's going as planned. Rei is carrying out the operation. Is it safe to assume that the project is about smuggling the Adam sample through Kaji and eventually implanting it in Gendo and that therefore the Project is strictly a Gendo/Fuyu thing, clearly a "malfeasance toward Seele" and that Seele won't find out until later on?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 10, 2013 11:40 am Sounds about right to me, unless there's something particular in NGE I'm forgetting.
summary:
[]: What is the Adam Project             Quote Post by fearlubu » Sat May 15, 2010 3:06 pm Ive only noticed it mentioned a few times in the series....i was always curious in what that project was about.....

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat May 15, 2010 5:37 pm It's the Evangelion Project, also known as "Project E", where they clone Adam and make and maintain E
